environment_prompt: A vast golden wheat field at sunset. The sun setting behind distant mountains with warm golden light. A small dark wooden barn in the middle distance. Clear sky fading to orange at the horizon. Swaying wheat and grass stalks. The open field extends broadly on all sides, with enough space for a wild horse to gallop through the wheat. Above, the sky transitions from sunset orange to deepening blue, with the full dome visible for a nighttime starry sky transition after the sun dips below the mountains.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, standing eye-level view looking across the wheat field toward the setting sun and mountains.

interactions.action: A wild horse appears in the wheat field.
The sun sets below the horizon and the scene transitions to nighttime with a starry sky.
